title: Ancient Legend(远古传说)
description: Add a series of new things and give you a new experience.
body:
#  Ancient Legend

_**Important Notice: To play this mod, please make sure to activate the world rule of "doImmediateRespawn".Otherwise, the power of the God of Peace can never be reborn when you enter the dimension of peace after joining the Chaos. This will directly damage your save, which will be repaired later.(重要提示：游玩此mod，请务必开启“立刻重生”的世界规则。否则，止灾之魔神的力量可以在你加入混沌族后进入心灵维度时永远无法重生。这会直接破坏你的存档，后面会进行修复。)**_


##                                                   About Mod Version(关于mod版本)


### **Intro(简介)**:

The difference between mod version and data package version is quite significant. After removing some redundant functions, I kept some important features of the datapack. At present, the number of members in the creative team is not large, so the update speed will not be very fast.Once there are any issues in the mod that affect the gaming experience, I will update it as soon as possible.Even releasing multiple versions in a day.（mod版本和数据包版本区别有点大。我把一些赘余的功能去除后，将数据包的一些重要特点保留了下来。目前创作团队的人数不多，因此更新的速度不会很快。一旦mod中出现影响游戏体验的问题，我会尽快更新。甚至一天内发布多个版本。）

* The currently reserved functions are（目前暂定保留的功能为）:

1. magic.(魔法)
2. dimension.（维度）

* The temporarily removed functions are（目前暂定移除的功能为）:

1. achievement.（成就）
2. Additional recipes.(附加的配方)
3. enchantment.(附魔)[under discussion(内部讨论中)]


##                       What new content has been added to the module? （模组新加哪些内容？）                                    

- New blocks.(新的方块)
- New equipment and tools.（新的装备和工具）
- New weapons.（新的武器）
- New dimension.（新的维度）
- New ores.（新的矿石）
- New race.(新的种族) [Completed in SnapShot Version-2(快照2版本中已完成。)]
- Riding system.(骑乘系统)[coming soon(敬请期待)]
- New mobs.（新的生物）[Completed in Version2.0.0.(2.0.0版本中已完成)]
- New buildings.（新的建筑物）[coming soon(敬请期待)]


##                                                     About God(关于魔神)

  It is said that they are foreign forces and should not belong to this world of only blocks. But for some unknown reason, the God of abyss descended here, and its appearance has caused great suffering for the villagers in the minecraft world. The villagers hope that powerful players can help them.(据说，它们是外来的势力，本不该属于这个只有方块的世界。但是不知道出于什么原因，极渊魔神降临于此，它的出现已经导致方块世界的村民们饱受煎熬，村民们希望强大的玩家能够帮助他们。)

##                                                     About Dimension(关于维度)

  The collapse dimension was discovered by the villagers. According to some villagers, that dimension itself is not like this, but rather caused by the erosion of the terrifying God of Abyss. As for the Mind dimension, people are not aware of it. Some people from outside the world say that although it is the territory of the God of Peace, it is a dangerous place. Currently, no one can enter this dimension, or have those who enter never come out again???（崩塌维度是村民们发现的。据一些村民所说，那个维度本身并不是这副摸样，而是因为可怕的极渊魔神的侵蚀导致这一切的发生。至于心灵维度，人们对此并不知情。有来自世界之外的人说，虽然它是止灾魔神的地盘，但那里是个危险的地方，目前没有任何人能够进入这个维度，还是说进去的人再也没出来过？？？）

![Picture of the portal frame, frame of dirt and frame of silent dirt.(传送门框架的演示图片，分别是泥土框架和沉寂土框架)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c9f21f9b228d360eb8aa15e16e2c995d9b58233_0.webp)

Picture of the portal frame, frame of dirt and frame of silent dirt.(传送门框架的演示图片，分别是泥土框架和沉寂土框架)


##                                                      About Magic Ghost(关于魔蕴鬼魂)

  They come from outside the world of blocks, and their bodies are no longer composed of flesh and blood. As their name suggests, in another world led by gods, they are called **the Magic Ghost**, which is a form of consciousness that still exists after the death of the body of the people in that world. Magic Ghosts only obey the  **Ghost King** , and the ruling organization established under the leadership of the Ghost King is called the **"Party Of Ghost Royal"**. They often do unknown things under the leadership of the Ghost King. But the Ghost King was not very popular in that world, and people called him the **"The God Of Abyss"**.(他们来自方块世界之外，他们的身体不再由血肉组成。正如其名，在另一个由神领导的世界里，他们被称为“魔蕴鬼魂”，这是一种在那个世界的人死后仍然存在的意识形式。魔蕴鬼魂只服从 **鬼王** ，在鬼王领导下建立的统治组织被称为“**鬼族皇家**”。他们经常在鬼王的领导下做一些不为人知的事情。但鬼王在那个世界并不受欢迎，人们称他为“极渊之神”。)


##        About plot(关于剧情)

After internal discussions within the creator team, we have ultimately decided to adopt a fragmented narrative of the plot. On the one hand, it can not affect the player's gaming experience, and on the other hand, it can reduce the workload of our team's production. If you are not interested in the plot we have created, you can simply play the regular content in our mod.（经过创作队伍的内部讨论，我们最终决定采用剧情碎片化叙事。一方面可以不影响玩家的游玩体验，另一方面可以减小我们团队制作的工作量。如果你对我们制作的剧情不感兴趣，那么可以直接游玩我们mod中的常规内容即可。）



[Demo video of the 0.0.2 version datapack，click on me to learn more details!](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1JG4PevEhs/?spm_id_from=333.999.list.card_archive.click&vd_source=1d6393ffbc604b3a82257c29a3a1f3b2)

[Demo video of the third Beta Version 0.0.5，click on me to learn more details!](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Nj26Y7EmK/?spm_id_from=333.1007.top_right_bar_window_custom_collection.content.click&vd_source=1d6393ffbc604b3a82257c29a3a1f3b2)
